title: Medical Diagnosis with Incomplete Data
scenario: Write a prompt to classify a set of medical cases into predefined diagnoses (disease, condition, injury), given a dataset with incomplete and noisy patient information. The LLM output should be in the format of a JSON object with patient information, diagnosis, and diagnosis confidence. Target output should include at least 50 medical cases, with each case correctly classified and diagnosis confidence accurately calculated.
constraints: Must handle incomplete and noisy patient data and relationships.
Must be robust to varying patient characteristics and symptoms.
Must provide accurate diagnosis categorization and confidence for each medical case.

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the LLM output conform to the expected JSON format?
Does the LLM correctly classify medical cases into predefined diagnoses?
Does the LLM accurately calculate diagnosis confidence for each classification?
Does the LLM output cover all medical cases and diagnoses?
